Seattle Reign FC at Orlando Pride

headlines.description: The defending champion Orlando Pride scored a goal in each half for a 2-0 win over the Seattle Reign in the quarterfinals of the NWSL playoffs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Having beaten cancer, Luana sends Pride to semis

events.name: Racing Louisville FC at Washington Spirit

headlines.description: Aubrey Kingsbury saved two shots in a penalty shootout and the Washington Spirit overcame Racing Louisville in the quarterfinals of the National Women's Soccer League playoffs on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kingsbury the shootout hero as Spirit reach semis

video.headline: Washington Spirit advance to NWSL semifinals with win in PKs

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play NWSL (Washington Spirit advance to NWSL semifinals with win in PKs) 2025/11/08 ESHEET

events.name: Gotham FC at Kansas City Current

headlines.description: Katie Stengel scored the winning goal and helped to clinch a 2-1 victory for Gotham FC over the Kansas City Current in the quarterfinals of the National Women's Soccer League playoffs Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: 8-seed Gotham stun No. 1 Current in extra time

video.headline: Kansas City Current vs. NJ/NY Gotham FC - Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play NWSL (Kansas City Current vs. NJ/NY Gotham FC - Game Highlights) 2025/11/09 ESHEET

events.name: San Diego Wave FC at Portland Thorns FC

headlines.description: Reilyn Turner scored the lone goal in the 94th minute and helped the Portland Thorns FC to a 1-0 extra time victory over the San Diego Wave FC in the quarterfinals of the National Women's Soccer League playoffs on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Thorns knock off Wave in playoffs, face Spirit next

video.headline: Portland Thorns FC vs. San Diego Wave FC - Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play NWSL (Portland Thorns FC vs. San Diego Wave FC - Game Highlights) 2025/11/09 ESHEET

categories.description: San Diego Wave FC @ Portland Thorns FC

events.name: Portland Thorns FC at Washington Spirit

headlines.description: The Washington Spirt are heading back to the NWSL Championship after beating the Portland Thorns 2-0 at Audi Field on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Washington beats Portland to return to NWSL final

video.headline: The Spirit head to the NWSL finals after win over the Thorns

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC NWSL Highlight (The Spirit head to the NWSL finals after win over the Thorns) 2025/11/15 ESHEET

headlines.description: Jaedyn Shaw scored with practically the last kick of the game and Gotham FC beat the Orlando Pride 1-0 on Sunday to advance to the NWSL championship game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gotham beat champs Orlando to reach NWSL final

video.headline: Jaedyn Shaw's added-time winner wins it for Gotham

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight NWSL (Jaedyn Shaw's added-time winner wins it for Gotham) 2025/11/16 ESHEET

headlines.description: Rose Lavelle scored in the 80th minute and the eighth-seeded Gotham FC beat the Washington Spirit 1-0 on Saturday night to win their second National Women's Soccer League championship.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gotham beat Washington to win NWSL Championship

video.headline: Washington Spirit vs. NJ/NY Gotham FC - Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play NWSL (Washington Spirit vs. NJ/NY Gotham FC - Game Highlights) 2025/11/23 ESHEET
